\newcommand{\ourmethod}{\textsc{PaperOrchestra}}
\newcommand{\ourdataset}{\texttt{PaperWritingBench}}
\newcommand{\mylatex}{L\kern-.36em\raisebox{0.3ex}{\textsc{a}}\kern-.15em T\kern-.1667em\lower.5ex\hbox{E}\kern-.125em X}

\definecolor{best_color}{HTML}{90EE90}  
\definecolor{second_color}{HTML}{FFFF99}

\definecolor{promptbg}{RGB}{248,248,248}
\definecolor{promptborder}{RGB}{210,210,210}

\newcommand{\cmark}{\textcolor{green!70!black}{\ding{51}}} % Green Check
\newcommand{\xmark}{\textcolor{red!80!black}{\ding{55}}}   % Red Cross
\newcommand{\pmark}{%                                      % Yellow Half-circle
  \tikz[baseline=-0.5ex]{%
    \draw[fill=white] (0,0) circle (0.65ex);
    \clip (0,0) circle (0.65ex);
    \fill[yellow!90!orange] (-0.65ex,-0.65ex) rectangle (0,0.65ex);
    \draw (0,0) circle (0.65ex);
  }%
}

% --- Define Colors for Raw Materials ---
% You can adjust these HTML hex codes to fit your exact document theme
\definecolor{rawbg}{HTML}{F4F8FC}       % A very soft, icy blue for the background
\definecolor{rawborder}{HTML}{5D8AA8}   % A darker, muted blue for the border/title background

% --- Raw Material Box Environment ---
\newtcolorbox{rawmaterialbox}[1][]{%
  enhanced,
  breakable,
  colback=rawbg,
  colframe=rawborder,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  arc=3pt,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=6pt, bottom=6pt,
  title=#1,
  fonttitle=\bfseries\small,
  coltitle=white % Keeps the title text crisp against the darker border color
}

% --- Define Colors for Human Evaluation ---
\definecolor{humanevalbg}{HTML}{F2F2F2}      % Soft, very light grey background
\definecolor{humanevalborder}{HTML}{A6A6A6}  % Solid medium-light grey border

% --- Human Evaluation Box Environment ---
\newtcolorbox{humanevalbox}[1][]{%
  enhanced,
  breakable,
  colback=humanevalbg,
  colframe=humanevalborder,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  arc=3pt,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=6pt, bottom=6pt,
  title=#1,
  fonttitle=\bfseries\small,
  coltitle=white % Keeps the title text crisp against the darker border color
}

% ==========================================
% PROMPT BOX COLORS
% ==========================================
% \definecolor{paperbg}{HTML}{E8F4F8}       % Light, airy baby blue
% \definecolor{paperborder}{HTML}{B1D0E0}   % Solid pastel blue border

% Leakage Prevention (Baby Pink)
\definecolor{leakbg}{HTML}{FDECF2}     % Light, true baby pink
\definecolor{leakborder}{HTML}{E8B4C8} % Solid pastel pink border

% Paper Writing (Soft Sage / Sea Glass)
\definecolor{paperbg}{HTML}{E8F0ED}       
\definecolor{paperborder}{HTML}{9EB4AD} 

% Raw Material Extraction (Soft Mauve/Blush)
\definecolor{extractbg}{HTML}{F6F0F2}    
\definecolor{extractborder}{HTML}{C5A8B0}

% Autoraters (Soft Parchment/Sand)
\definecolor{raterbg}{HTML}{FEF5E7}
\definecolor{raterborder}{HTML}{EBD1A7}  

% ==========================================
% PROMPT BOX ENVIRONMENTS
% ==========================================

% Leakage Prevention Prompt Box
\newtcolorbox{leakpromptbox}[1][]{%
  enhanced,
  breakable,
  colback=leakbg,
  colframe=leakborder,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  arc=3pt,
  left=6pt,right=6pt,top=6pt,bottom=6pt,
  title=#1,
  fonttitle=\bfseries\small,
  fontupper=\ttfamily\small\raggedright,
  coltitle=white
}

% Paper Writing Prompt Box
\newtcolorbox{paperpromptbox}[1][]{%
  enhanced,
  breakable,
  colback=paperbg,
  colframe=paperborder,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  arc=3pt,
  left=6pt,right=6pt,top=6pt,bottom=6pt,
  title=#1,
  fonttitle=\bfseries\small,
  fontupper=\ttfamily\small\raggedright,
  coltitle=white
}

% Raw Material Extraction Prompt Box
\newtcolorbox{extractpromptbox}[1][]{%
  enhanced,
  breakable,
  colback=extractbg,
  colframe=extractborder,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  arc=3pt,
  left=6pt,right=6pt,top=6pt,bottom=6pt,
  title=#1,
  fonttitle=\bfseries\small,
  fontupper=\ttfamily\small\raggedright,
  coltitle=white
}

% Autoraters Prompt Box
\newtcolorbox{raterpromptbox}[1][]{%
  enhanced,
  breakable,
  colback=raterbg,
  colframe=raterborder,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  arc=3pt,
  left=6pt,right=6pt,top=6pt,bottom=6pt,
  title=#1,
  fonttitle=\bfseries\small,

}

  boxrule=0.5pt,
